stakeholders.role: Prospective customers across Europe buying handmade ceramics
stakeholders.inference_basis: Brief targets buyers across Europe purchasing mugs, bowls, and vases year-round instead of only at weekend craft markets

stakeholders.role: Studio team operating the store day to day
stakeholders.inference_basis: Brief plans catalog upkeep, seasonal drops, customer accounts, and a newsletter alongside continued weekend markets - all run by the studio itself
Brief states the brand site is built on a hosted storefront platform; the store depends on the provider's uptime, features, and subscription terms

stakeholders.role: Data protection authority for the store's home jurisdiction
stakeholders.inference_basis: Brief collects EU customer personal data (customer accounts, email newsletter), activating lawful-processing obligations and the supervisory authority's audit and penalty powers
Brief's year-one goals (500 orders, 2,000 subscribers) imply an owner-funded launch budget the owners expect the store to pay back within year one
Brief commits to keeping the studio's weekend market presence alongside the store; organizers are affected if online demand displaces market attendance
